claim: Open Code's Zen router allows pay-as-you-go model usage (paying only for what you consume) rather than subscription plans like Cursor ($20/mo) or Cloud Code ($17/mo)
actionable: Use Open Code with Zen for cost-efficient LLM usage if your coding tasks are episodic or variable in volume
source_title: Opencode Is Probably The Best Coding Agent I've Ever Used

claim: Open Code's Zen model router routes requests to the latest and highest-performing models approved by the team, automatically updating available models without user intervention
actionable: Configure Open Code to use Zen for automatic access to the latest frontier models without manual switching
source_title: Opencode Is Probably The Best Coding Agent I've Ever Used

claim: Open Code's local server model (running on user's machine) is preferable to cloud-based coding agents (Devon, Codex) for file access and privacy
actionable: Run Open Code locally instead of cloud-based agents when handling sensitive codebases or when you need faster feedback loops
source_title: Opencode Is Probably The Best Coding Agent I've Ever Used

claim: Open Code supports custom agents with individual temperature settings, verbosity levels, and dedicated models via agent configuration files
actionable: Create specialized agent personas (deep thinker, email responder, reviewer) with different temperatures and model selections for different tasks
source_title: Opencode Is Probably The Best Coding Agent I've Ever Used

claim: Open Code's MCP integration allows security scanning tools like Snyk to run directly within the agent for dependency and code vulnerability detection
actionable: Add Snyk MCP to Open Code configuration to enable automatic security scanning as part of coding workflows
source_title: Opencode Is Probably The Best Coding Agent I've Ever Used

claim: Open Code's local REST API enables integration with other tools by exposing sessions, agents, and other functionality for programmatic access
actionable: Use Open Code's REST API to integrate agentic workflows into custom tooling or automation pipelines
source_title: Opencode Is Probably The Best Coding Agent I've Ever Used
